metadata.sourcePolicy: Display data is curated locally. hi-dep and mxswat are validation sources. The manual source checker reports differences but does not publish automatically.

items.name: Aces & Eights
bonuses: 4pc: Dead Man’s Hand — flip cards by landing MMR shots; reveal a hand for amplified weapon damage.
items.backpack: Ace in the Sleeve — improves Dead Man’s Hand card cycling / value.
items.chest: No Limit — improves the 4pc damage window / card benefit.

items.name: Aegis
bonuses: 4pc: Stoic — defensive scaling built around incoming damage and team positioning.
items.backpack: Polyethylene Plating — strengthens Stoic’s defensive payoff.
items.chest: Deceit — amplifies Stoic’s chest-side defensive behavior.

items.name: Breaking Point
bonuses: 2pc: +25% Rifle Damage and +25% Marksman Rifle Damage
4pc: On Point — builds weapon damage through precision play.
items.backpack: Point of Honor — increases On Point’s weapon damage bonus.
items.chest: Point of No Return — extends On Point’s active timer.

items.name: Cavalier
bonuses: 4pc: Charging — reduces incoming skill damage for allies after skill interaction.
items.backpack: Safe Charge — improves Charging uptime / support value.
items.chest: Overcharging — improves the main support effect from Charging.

items.name: Core Strength
bonuses: 3pc: +5% Weapon Damage, +5% Total Armor, +5% Skill Efficiency
4pc: Core Exercise — each gear core grants a portion of the other two core bonus types.
items.backpack: Outer Core — backpack carries three core attributes and feeds the Core Exercise loop.
items.chest: Inner Core — raises Core Exercise’s converted core bonus from 40% to 75%.
items.coreNotes: Pieces can drop with random core attributes; backpack is modeled as a special three-core exception pending ongoing source review.

items.name: Eclipse Protocol
bonuses: 4pc: Indirect Transmission — killing a status-affected enemy spreads the status effect.
items.backpack: Symptom Aggravator — increases damage to status-affected enemies.
items.chest: Proliferation — increases spread range / transfer strength of Indirect Transmission.

items.name: Foundry Bulwark
bonuses: 4pc: Makeshift Repairs — repairs a portion of damage taken over time.
items.backpack: Improved Materials — increases Makeshift Repairs armor return.
items.chest: Process Refinery — improves the repair amount / timing window.

items.name: Future Initiative
bonuses: 4pc: Ground Control — full armor allies gain increased weapon/skill damage; repairs spread to allies.
items.backpack: Strategic Combat Support — increases Ground Control proximity repair value.
items.chest: Tactical Superiority — increases Ground Control team damage bonus.

items.name: Hard Wired
bonuses: 4pc: Feedback Loop — using/canceling one skill refreshes the other skill and boosts skill output.
items.backpack: Short Circuit — lowers Feedback Loop cooldown.
items.chest: Positive Reinforcement — improves Feedback Loop damage/repair bonus.

items.name: Heartbreaker
bonuses: 2pc: +15% Assault Rifle Damage and +15% LMG Damage
4pc: Heartstopper — pulsed headshots stack bonus armor and weapon damage.
items.backpack: Cold — increases Heartstopper bonus armor / damage gains.
items.chest: Max BPM — increases Heartstopper maximum stacks.

items.name: Hotshot
bonuses: 4pc: Headache — headshot kills cycle armor repair, bonus armor, and magazine refill effects.
items.backpack: Blessed — improves Headache’s bonus sequence.
items.chest: Daring — improves the Headache headshot chain payoff.

items.name: Hunter’s Fury
bonuses: 3pc: +20% Armor on Kill and +100% Health on Kill
4pc: Apex Predator — close-range kills disorient nearby enemies and amplify damage.
items.backpack: Overwhelming Force — increases Apex Predator damage amplification.
items.chest: Endless Hunger — extends Apex Predator stack duration.

items.name: Negotiator’s Dilemma
bonuses: 4pc: Hostile Negotiations — critical hits mark enemies and spread damage between marks.
items.backpack: Critical Measures — increases damage transferred to marked enemies.
items.chest: Target Rich Environment — increases the number of marked targets.

items.name: Ongoing Directive
bonuses: 4pc: Rules of Engagement — killing status-affected enemies creates Hollow-Point ammo.
items.backpack: Trauma Specialist — increases Hollow-Point ammo damage amplification.
items.chest: Parabellum Rounds — improves Hollow-Point ammo / bleed behavior.

items.name: Refactor
bonuses: 4pc: Refactor set talent — skill-forward loop for modern hybrid builds.
items.backpack: Backpack amplifier — improves the 4pc skill loop.
items.chest: Chest amplifier — improves the 4pc skill loop.

items.name: Rigger
bonuses: 4pc: Tend and Befriend — interacting with deployed skills gives skill damage and resets cooldowns when canceled.
items.backpack: Complete Uptime — removes Tend and Befriend cooldown.
items.chest: Best Buds — improves Tend and Befriend damage bonus.

items.name: Striker’s Battlegear
bonuses: 4pc: Striker’s Gamble — weapon hits build stacks for increasing weapon damage.
items.backpack: Risk Management — increases the weapon damage gained per stack.
items.chest: Press the Advantage — increases maximum Striker’s Gamble stacks.

items.name: Tip of the Spear
bonuses: 4pc: Aggressive Recon — signature weapon hits create signature ammo and boost weapon damage.
items.backpack: Signature Moves — increases Aggressive Recon weapon damage bonus.
items.chest: Specialized Destruction — improves signature weapon damage / ammo payoff.

items.name: Tipping Scales
bonuses: 4pc: Tipping Scales set talent — balance-focused team/hybrid loop.
items.backpack: Backpack amplifier — improves the 4pc balance mechanic.
items.chest: Chest amplifier — improves the 4pc balance mechanic.

items.name: Umbra Initiative
bonuses: 4pc: From the Shadows / Into the Light — cover and out-of-cover states build crit damage, RPM, and armor regen.
items.backpack: Into the Light — improves armor regeneration / stack behavior.
items.chest: From the Shadows — improves offensive stack behavior.
